raw_source.title: [Remote] Satoshi Protocol is looking for Community Manager, $2,500 - $3,500 / month
raw_source.body:
## About
Satoshi Protocol is the first CDP protocol built on BEVM, users could deposit BTC as collateral to borrow stablecoin SAT. This serves as the cornerstone for BTCfi to unleash trillions worth of Bitcoin.

## Responsibilities
・Community Engagement: Develop and execute a comprehensive community engagement strategy across platforms such as Discord, Telegram, Twitter, WeChat, and more.
・Campaign Collaboration: Work closely with the marketing team to create and execute campaigns, quests, and giveaways for community engagement.
・Issue Management: Aggregate issues, troubleshoot, control moderation speed and quality, and establish local communities.
・User Feedback: Conduct user satisfaction surveys and analyze results to implement necessary adaptations.
・Community Expansion: Oversee community expansion and engagement into additional geographic regions and languages.
・Team Leadership: Assist in the leadership and growth of the Moderation and Ambassador teams.

## Requirements
・Community Management Experience:  Demonstrated experience in community management, with a focus on DeFi and Web3.
・Online Community Building: Proven track record in building and managing online communities.
・Bilingual Skills: Excellent communication and organizational skills in both Chinese and English.
・Independent Worker: Ability to work independently and make decisions in a fast-paced environment.
・Blockchain Knowledge: Strong understanding of Bitcoin and blockchain technology.
・Creative Engagement: Creative mindset with the ability to engage and inspire community members.

## Job Nature
- Full-time
- Remote

## Salary and Benefits
$2,500 - $3,500 / month
・Be part of a team at the cutting edge of DeFi and Bitcoin Layer 2 technologies.
・Opportunity to shape the community strategy of a stablecoin protocol.
・Work in a dynamic and collaborative environment.
・Competitive salary and benefits package.

## Contact
marketing@satoshiprotocol.org

## How to Apply

1. Send Application Email
    ・Send your application to: marketing@satoshiprotocol.org
    ・Subject : the position + your name
    
2. Email Content
   ・The position you are applying for
   ・CV
   ・Resume
   ・Availability for meetings
   ・The earliest date you can start
   ・Where do you find the recruiting message?
    
3. Recommender
   ・If you have a recommender, please include their name and contact information in the email.
    
Thank you for your application. We look forward to learning more about you and discussing potential collaboration opportunities.

## Links
- Website : https://satoshiprotocol.org/
- Twitter : https://twitter.com/SatoshiBEVM
- Medium : https://medium.com/@satoshi-protocol
- Doc : https://docs.satoshiprotocol.org/intro/introduction
- Telegram : https://t.me/satoshi_sat
- Discord : https://discord.gg/satoshiprotocol
